creator: nospam@ofloo.net
text:
Created attachment 176290
screenshot of the crash

Upgraded from FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p10 to FreeBSD 11-RELEASE-p2

used generic configuration file with options below:

options                 IPFIREWALL
options                 IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE
options                 IPFIREWALL_DEFAULT_TO_ACCEPT
options                 DUMMYNET
options                 IPDIVERT
options                 CONSPEED=115200
options                 HZ=1000
options                 VIMAGE

the installkernel ended with
--- afterinstall ---
kldxref /boot/kernel
